@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly listing 2018-reviewed businesses and converting IDs, the agent queried the business collection with an incorrect parking filter ("attributes.BusinessParking": {$ne: null} OR "attributes.BikeParking": "True"), which fails to properly capture businesses offering parking (e.g., not checking BusinessParking == "True" or parsing nested/encoded values), leading to only 5 matches instead of the ground-truth 35.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

The agent filtered businesses by merely checking if attributes.BusinessParking or attributes.BikeParking existed in the Mongo query (var_function-call-9731177178573063439) rather than verifying that parking was actually offered (e.g., BikeParking == "True" or any BusinessParking option == True), leading to an incorrect count.
